raw.advertiser_name: 크랙 - 즉흥 서사 플레이, AI 채팅

hook.summary: Close-up of a blushing anime male character with dog ears looking submissively at the viewer.
hook.visual_action: The character smiles and blushes while looking directly into the camera with a submissive expression.
hook.text_overlay: 어디가... 나 키워... 폭군황제가 이혼해주지 않는다

scene_flow: Initial close-up of a blonde male character with dog ears and a submissive expression.
Slight shift in the character's pose and expression, maintaining the blushing look.
Introduction of the webtoon title with large text overlays.
Final call to action screen with the full title and a button-like text.
audience_proxy: Women who enjoy romance webtoons and otome games featuring submissive male leads.
